title: CSB Organises Programme on Quantum Technologies and Post-Quantum Security
summary: Cyber Security Brunei (the national cyber security agency) press release announcing the first Quantum Technology and Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) Workshop, co-hosted with Malaysia's NACSA and PTPKM, attended by national agencies, regulators and banks to assess Brunei Darussalam's readiness on post-quantum cryptography and align national effort towards PQC migration.
